description_long: This object consists of a sturdy, metallic rack holding a set of dumbbells arranged in two rows by increasing size from top to bottom. The rack is constructed from tubular metal with a silver finish and is positioned on a rectangular, textured maroon mat. The dumbbells themselves have cylindrical, black weights on each end and a central handle, with the weights appearing to be made of solid metal or coated in rubber. The rack is designed to keep the dumbbells organized and easily accessible, with each dumbbell resting securely in its own slot. The overall setup is typical for gym or fitness environments, providing a safe and stable storage solution for free weights.
description: A metallic rack holds multiple black dumbbells of varying sizes, all set atop a maroon mat. The setup is robust and organized, suitable for gym or fitness use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set of dumbbells arranged in two rows on the rack, with all handles and weights clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the rack and the thickness of the dumbbells, showing the staggered arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the dumbbells and the supporting structure of the rack, with less detail on the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the rack's frame and the alignment of the dumbbells.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, round cross-section, likely knurled or textured for grip, metallic finish.
attribute_end_cap_design: Round, flat end caps, solid black, likely rubber-coated or painted metal, smooth surface with no visible patterns.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage.
